data.label: parseGithubRepo
data.code:
import json, sys, re
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

raw = json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(raw, str):
    raw = json.loads(raw)

url = (raw.get("github_url") or "").strip()
# tolerate trailing slash, .git, and deep links like /tree/main
m = re.search(r"github\.com/([^/\s]+)/([^/\s#?]+?)(?:\.git)?(?:[/#?].*)?$", url)
owner, repo = (m.group(1), m.group(2)) if m else ("", "")

# 90-day window so commit velocity is measured over a fixed period (see §3.2)
since = (datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=90)).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")

print(json.dumps({"owner": owner, "repo": repo, "since": since}))

data.label: githubHealthCompute
dataExtract
data.code:
import json, sys

raw = json.load(sys.stdin)
if isinstance(raw, str):
    raw = json.loads(raw)

# Unwrap agent / sub-workflow output wrappers (handles nesting)
while isinstance(raw, dict) and "output" in raw and isinstance(raw["output"], dict):
    raw = raw["output"]

# Canonicalise the package registry to the exact OSV ecosystem name
REG = {
    "pypi": "PyPI", "pip": "PyPI", "python": "PyPI",
    "npm": "npm", "node": "npm", "nodejs": "npm", "javascript": "npm", "js": "npm", "ts": "npm",
    "": "none", "none": "none", "null": "none",
}
reg = (raw.get("package_registry") or "").strip()
raw["package_registry"] = REG.get(reg.lower(), reg)

# Guarantee the fields branch prompts interpolate, so they never render as blank tokens
raw.setdefault("evaluation_context", "")
raw.setdefault("package_name", "")
raw.setdefault("queries", {})

print(json.dumps(raw))
